name: cloud-skills
description: Multi-cloud CLI plugins for Claude Code — manage Hetzner, AWS, Azure, GCP, and Scaleway through their official command-line tools. Install one provider or all of them.

plugins.name: hcloud
plugins.description: Hetzner Cloud CLI skills, commands, and safety hooks — servers, networking, storage, DNS, security, plus 260+ bundled reference pages

plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: AWS CLI skills and safety hooks — authentication, EC2 compute lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: azure
plugins.description: Azure CLI (az) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Virtual Machine lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: gcp
plugins.description: Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Compute Engine instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: scaleway
plugins.description: Scaleway CLI (scw) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command
